codeReview.summary: Connection state machine implementation and tests align with the required transitions, backoff schedule, auth failure handling, token refresh fallback, and background/foreground behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mobile-worker skill mandates tests in __tests__ directories, but Jest is configured to run any src/**/*.test.ts(x) and the new connection tests are colocated in src/state/connection.test.ts. The skill guidance may be overly strict or outdated.

summary: Reviewed the mobile connection state machine changes; no blocking issues found and tests cover the expected behaviors.
